## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover success and failure paths.
- [ ] `gofmt`, `go mod tidy -diff`, vet, and race tests pass.
- [ ] No keys, prompts, databases, real agent logs, or private identifiers were added.
- [ ] User-facing limitations and migration concerns are documented.
- [ ] Pricing changes cite a first-party source and verification date.
- [ ] I have the right to license this contribution under MIT.
